        template<size_t element_count = 10>
        void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
            hexi::block_allocator<int, element_count> allocator;

            int* ptr1 = allocator.allocate();
            int* ptr2 = allocator.allocate();

            // Now deallocate the first one
            allocator.deallocate(ptr1);

            // Now allocate a third one, which should come from the free list (ptr1's memory)
            int* ptr3 = allocator.allocate();

            // Check that ptr3 is the same as ptr1
            assert(reinterpret_cast<std::uintptr_t>(ptr3) == reinterpret_cast<std::uintptr_t>(ptr1));

            // Now deallocate ptr2 and ptr3
            allocator.deallocate(ptr2);
            allocator.deallocate(ptr3);
        }
